text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm thinking today's the perfect day to
take a nap.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I found a great place for it right here. Time
to count some sheep...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aaah... Those were some quality Zs! ...Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, sure is chilly. How'd a master napper like me
forget to wake up? Achoo!
